name: opencode-notify-macos
description: Native macOS notifications for OpenCode – simple, secure, no extra dependencies

opencode.name: opencode-notify-macos
opencode.description: Native macOS notifications for OpenCode – simple, secure, no extra dependencies

scripts.build: bun build src/entry.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --external detect-terminal --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
